DeleteRegionBandwidth.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](CSN/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
DeleteRegionBandwidth.csnBpId: The ID of the bandwidth package
DeleteRegionBandwidth.localRegion: The local region of the regional bandwidth
DeleteRegionBandwidth.peerRegion: The peer region of the regional bandwidth
